A prior section 300b, , as added , , ; amended , , , authorized Secretary to make grants and enter contracts with public and nonprofit private entities with respect to establishment of voluntary sickle cell anemia screening and counseling programs and to develop and disseminate informational and educational materials relating to sickle cell anemia, prior to repeal by , , .act July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title XI, § 1101Pub.
